_**User (2026-04-15 07:52:01Z)**_

---

_**Agent (copilot/auto)**_

No. The current implementation plays remote CC0 audio URLs directly from [src/components/Timer.tsx](src/components/Timer.tsx).

That means:
- No sound files were added to the repo
- The app depends on network access to fetch those audio files
- Offline/PWA mode will not reliably include those sounds unless the browser happens to cache them

If you want, I can change this next to bundle the 4 sounds locally under something like `public/sounds/` and update the timer to use local paths instead. That would be the better setup for reliability and offline use.
